title: Project Telos Eighth-Wave Local Reproduction And Publishing Pipeline Claims

claims.text: The eighth-wave local reproduction receipt records pandas-dev/pandas#63458 with Python 3.12.10, pandas 3.0.3, pyarrow 24.0.0, and reproduction status failed-before-patch.
claims.falsification: The local reproduction receipt is missing or any named version/status field differs.

claims.text: The eighth-wave blocked readiness packet remains not PR-ready and lists blockers for missing passing test evidence, non-MATCH verifier verdict, and missing patch summary.
claims.falsification: The packet is PR-ready, chooses open-pr, or omits any of the named blockers.

claims.text: The eighth-wave arXiv intake captured 14 retained paper source leads across three Gather stores.
claims.falsification: The three Gather arXiv stores are missing or their retained catalog rows do not total 14.

claims.text: The proof-carrying research loops working paper defines the stricter promotion ladder and keeps paper/source claims fenced.
claims.falsification: The working paper is missing the promotion ladder or promotes source leads into truth claims.

claims.text: The eighth-wave outreach package distinguishes local failing reproduction, readiness, source leads, website copy, and official paper submission boundaries.
claims.falsification: The outreach package claims a pandas fix, pandas source inspection, passing pandas tests, current-main verification, arXiv truth, official submission, or a new natural law.
